rules.rule_text:
rule aws_cli
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a1 = "aws s3 " ascii
		$a2 = "aws ec2 " ascii
		$a3 = "aws ecr " ascii
		$a4 = "aws cognito-identity" ascii
		$a5 = "aws iam " ascii
		$a6 = "aws waf " ascii

	condition:
		any of them
}
